description: Start date must be less than or equal to today.
conditions: aplicado somente quando start_date estiver definido

description: Start date must be after or equal to the last animal event.
conditions: aplicado somente quando start_date estiver definido
se o último evento do animal for o próprio parto, compara com o penúltimo evento ou a data de entrada

description: Interval between the last mating date and farrowing start must be within farm-configured gestation limits.
conditions: aplicado somente quando start_date estiver definido
para porcas OG gestantes sem cobertura registrada, utiliza a mating_date do animal
validado contra os threshold_references configurados na granja (event_set: animal_parturition, type: start_date)

description: If greater than 0, the value must be within the farm-configured live births range.
conditions: aplicado somente quando live_births > 0
validado contra os threshold_references configurados na granja (event_set: animal_parturition, type: live_births)

description: If greater than 0, the value must be within the farm-configured still births range.
conditions: aplicado somente quando stillbirths > 0
validado contra os threshold_references configurados na granja (event_set: animal_parturition, type: stillbirths)

description: If greater than 0, the value must be within the farm-configured mummified fetuses range.
conditions: aplicado somente quando mummified_fetuses > 0
validado contra os threshold_references configurados na granja (event_set: animal_parturition, type: mummified_fetuses)

description: Total born (live_births + stillbirths + mummified_fetuses) must be greater than 0.
conditions: aplicado somente quando ao menos um dos campos de nascimento estiver definido

description: The sum of live births, stillbirths, and mummified fetuses must be within the farm-configured total born range.
conditions: aplicado somente quando ao menos um dos campos de nascimento estiver definido
validado contra os threshold_references configurados na granja (event_set: animal_parturition, type: total_born)

description: The sum of female and male offsprings must not exceed the total number of live births.
conditions: aplicado somente quando female_offsprings ou male_offsprings estiverem definidos

description: Total and average weights must be greater than 0 if live births > 0.
conditions: aplicado somente quando live_births > 0 e ao menos um campo de peso estiver definido

description: Total and average weights must be 0 or null if live births = 0.
conditions: aplicado somente quando live_births = 0 e ao menos um campo de peso estiver definido

description: Average piglet weight must be within the farm-configured range when live births > 0.
conditions: aplicado somente quando live_births > 0 e average_off_weight estiver definido
validado contra os threshold_references configurados na granja (event_set: animal_parturition, type: average_off_weight)

description: Low viability count cannot exceed the number of live births.
conditions: aplicado somente quando low_viability estiver definido

description: Sow weight must be within the configured farm thresholds.
conditions: aplicado somente quando weight estiver definido
validado contra os threshold_references configurados na granja (event_set: animal_parturition, type: weight)

description: Cannot delete this event if there are subsequent events for this animal.
